summary: Comprehensive testing of Bengali Political Portfolio Website for Barrister Mahbubul Alam Salehi completed successfully. All major functionality works perfectly including backend APIs, frontend UI, navigation, contact form integration, and mobile responsiveness.

ui_bugs.issue: Submit button may be slightly small on mobile devices

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (/api/) responds correctly
Backend status check POST/GET endpoints work
Backend contact form POST/GET endpoints work with Bengali text
Frontend homepage loads with all sections (hero, about, vision, activities, footer)
Navigation bar with all Bengali links works correctly
All page routing works (Home, Biography, Vision, Activities, Contact)
Biography page loads with timeline and profile image
Vision page loads with 8-point vision details and images
Activities page loads with activity cards
Contact page loads with complete form (name, phone, email, message)
Contact form submission works perfectly with Bengali content
Contact form success message displays in Bengali
Contact form validation prevents empty submissions
Mobile navigation menu works
Mobile contact form submission works
Hero slider navigation works
All images load correctly
PDF download link is valid
Footer links all functional
Bengali language content displays properly throughout
